field_values.action_summary: The group encounters Mr. Joker, a cracked China Clown whose appearance is a result of his own foolishness (standing on his head too often).
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of the group reacting to mr_joker; Close-ups on mr_joker cracks
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: The specific pattern and location of cracks on mr_joker
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH020_SC004

## Production Intent
Introduce character texture and absurdity through a meeting with a fragile, damaged porcelain entity. The scene must balance the tension of encountering an unknown inhabitant with the comedic reveal of his physical defects caused by foolishness.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- mr_joker

## Required Environments
- dainty_china_country (white platter floor, tiny colorful china houses)

## Continuity Constraints
- The specific pattern and location of cracks on mr_joker (result of standing on head).

## Beat List
- BT001: Group encounters mr_joker.
- BT002: Visual identification of mr_joker.
- BT003: Discovery of the cracks.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
